title: Ox (BFF-1 bulk freighter)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Image}}
{{Youmay|BFF-1 bulk freighter|[[Ox/Legends|clone trooper]]}}
'''''Ox''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] that served with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] .

The [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] was part of a Rebel convoy, escorted by the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] [[Wolf (corvette group)|''Wolf'']], which contained supplies that were intended to aid in the establishing of a new base. However, the ships were attacked by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''[[Red Wind]]''. However, the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] managed to escape thanks to the efforts of Rebel [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''
